name: RPlog_Festival_and_Dance
title: Festival and Dance in Organa Park
summary: During a rain-dampened cultural festival in Organa Park on New Alderaan, Ambassador Ambrosia Delgard juggles diplomacy, motherhood, and intrigue while her precocious daughter Gabi grazes the food stalls. The sleepless Verpine doctor Vophsi, speaking for its anxious hive, confronts Ambrosia over the wisdom of holding such an opulent celebration while a bomber still threatens the city, and she answers that the festivity itself stands for hope and courage against fear. The NRI agent Drax Rendolen joins them, sharing that his team has caught two suspects whose tattoos point to the cult known as the Olumi Osahn, before sweeping Ambrosia onto the dance floor for an elegant, competitive waltz that rekindles old muscle memory. Amid the dancing, the disguised former Imperial Zeak Oppenhiemer and his Force-sensitive daughter Ara slip through the crowd to quietly press a 'liberated' stolen holosculpture into young Gabi's hands as a so-called birthday gift, treating it as her first diplomatic pouch, while the smuggler Jaspar Andromidas and his tech-savvy companion Feyd arrive seeking a word. As the evening winds down, Drax spots Zeak and abruptly excuses himself to give chase, and Ambrosia returns to her table to interrogate a fibbing Gabi about the mysterious package now in their keeping.
